summary: Verified SwarmSim tiered LLM model strategy fix. All 10 backend tests passed. The gemini-2.5-flash-lite model issue from iteration_6 has been fixed by changing to gemini-2.5-flash. Existing session (3a2d3e92-eb87-45f5-b9ab-9c61ec67fa0f) confirmed: 27 posts (21 posts + 6 batched replies), all posts have is_hub_post/belief_position/emotional_valence fields, report has quality_score 10/10, chat endpoint works. Frontend loads correctly with Document Upload and Live Intelligence tabs.
passed_tests: GET /api/sessions/{id}/simulation-status returns belief_summary, emotional_summary, network_stats, round_narratives
GET /api/sessions/{id}/posts returns 27 posts (21 posts + 6 replies) with is_hub_post, belief_position, emotional_valence fields
GET /api/sessions/{id}/report returns report with quality_score=10, prediction with confidence
POST /api/sessions/{id}/chat works with agent (returns meaningful response)
POST /api/sessions/{id}/fetch-live returns 202 and completes with graph entities
GET /api/sessions/{id}/agent-status returns completed agents with required fields
Frontend Document Upload view loads with file upload, prediction question input
Frontend Live Intelligence view loads with topic input, horizon options, Fetch & Analyze button
critical_code_review_comments: Three-tier LLM architecture working correctly: Premium (Sonnet 4), Fast (Haiku 4.5), Flash (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
Batched reply generation working - 6 replies generated across 3 rounds
All simulation posts include required fields: is_hub_post, belief_position, emotional_valence
Report quality check working with quality_score field
test_credentials: No auth required. Uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY from backend .env.
seed_data_creation: Used existing session 3a2d3e92-eb87-45f5-b9ab-9c61ec67fa0f with completed simulation data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tiered LLM features working. Session 3a2d3e92-eb87-45f5-b9ab-9c61ec67fa0f has complete simulation data (27 posts, 10 agents, report with quality_score 10). The gemini-2.5-flash model is now being used for call_flash() and works correctly for bulk post/reply/narrative generation.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Previous iteration used gemini-2.5-flash-lite which was not available. Fixed by changing to gemini-2.5-flash.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Confirmed fix by verifying existing session has 27 posts (including 6 batched replies) and all required fields present.
